notes: Inverse of vault/backup/tua-x.json. cat <ts>.dump | ssh vps204 'docker exec -i tuax-postgres pg_restore -c -U tuax -d tuax_mie' clean-reloads the database. -c drops + recreates objects, which routinely emits warnings on fresh objects; the runner classifies exit-1-with-only-warnings as pass. Code rollback for TUA-X is not handled here: it is git push vps204 +<prev_sha>:main and is Owner-driven (the post-receive hook re-runs docker compose). Healthcheck is the same http kind as the deploy config; on FAIL -> rollback-warn, Owner investigates.
